tasks.title: Track assignment dummy docs and README alignment
tasks.description: Record completion of assignment requirement to store dummy test documents in the GitHub repo and document setup/approach in README.
tasks.details: Implemented committed fixtures under tests/data/documents (dummy_invoice.pdf, dummy_contract.pdf, dummy_policy.pdf, dummy_scanned_snippet.png) plus tests/data/documents/README.md and expanded root README.md with assignment alignment, manual setup, Docker setup, and API examples.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify fixture files exist in repository and are valid types (PDF/PNG); ensure README sections are present and pytest remains green.

tasks.title: Implement upload intake and raw file handling
tasks.description: Accept and persist uploaded files with secure validation and deterministic document IDs.
tasks.details: Build MIME/type validation, filename sanitization, streaming upload storage under ./data/uploads, and response metadata including document_id and file path. Ensure traversal-safe paths and idempotent ingest keying.
tasks.testStrategy: Test allowed/blocked MIME types, path sanitization, large file streaming, and response contract fields.

tasks.title: Build Tier 1 text extraction with OCR fallback
tasks.description: Extract text quickly for MVP while handling scanned PDFs via OCR fallback.
tasks.details: Implement PyMuPDF extraction first, detect empty text layers, then invoke OCR fallback for image-only pages. Persist extraction metadata indicating method used and page-level provenance.
tasks.testStrategy: Use fixtures for text PDFs and scanned PDFs to validate fallback behavior and output ordering.

tasks.title: Implement layout-aware Docling parsing with table atomicity
tasks.description: Produce markdown output that preserves document structure and keeps tables intact.
tasks.details: Use Docling to generate sectioned markdown with stable block identifiers and page references. Guarantee table blocks are emitted as atomic units for downstream chunking and retrieval fidelity.
tasks.testStrategy: Fixture-based parser tests for headings/tables and regression snapshots for markdown stability.

tasks.title: Implement parent-child chunking with lineage metadata
tasks.description: Create retrieval-friendly chunks that link 256-token children to 1024-token parent context.
tasks.details: Build tokenizer-aware chunkers that preserve ordering, section path, page refs, and table-atomic behavior. Emit metadata fields required for hybrid search and evidence grounding.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit-test chunk size constraints, child-parent linkage completeness, and unsplit table guarantees.

tasks.title: Implement RedisVL index schema and hybrid embedding persistence
tasks.description: Persist vectors and metadata in segregated indices for fast and deep modes.
tasks.details: Define tier1_idx and tier4_idx schemas, metadata filters, dimension validation, and embedding provider mapping (MiniLM local, Gemini cloud). Persist vectors with model/version metadata and searchable tags.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests for index bootstrap, insert/query round trips, metadata filtering, and dimension mismatch failures.

tasks.title: Orchestrate ingestion pipeline lifecycle and error handling
tasks.description: Coordinate upload, parse, chunk, embed, and index stages with robust status transitions.
tasks.details: Implement stage orchestration with typed errors, retries/backoff, and statuses (uploaded, processing, partial, indexed, failed). Add idempotency protections and structured logs keyed by document_id.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests for happy path and stage failure injection validating lifecycle and retry semantics.

subtasks.title: Define ingestion lifecycle model and state transitions
subtasks.description: Specify transitions for uploaded->processing->partial/indexed/failed, stage boundaries, and terminal conditions; include validation rules for illegal transitions.

subtasks.title: Implement orchestrator runner for parse/chunk/embed/index stages
subtasks.description: Build pipeline coordinator that executes stages in order, captures stage outputs, and propagates typed errors with retry/backoff hooks.

subtasks.title: Add idempotency and duplicate-ingest safeguards
subtasks.description: Enforce idempotency keys/document replay checks so repeated requests do not duplicate vectors or corrupt state.

subtasks.title: Instrument structured logging and correlation IDs
subtasks.description: Emit structured logs keyed by document_id with stage timing, retry counts, and failure codes to support debugging and audits.

subtasks.title: Build integration tests for lifecycle and failure injection
subtasks.description: Validate happy path to indexed plus injected failures at each stage to confirm status transitions, retries, and partial/failed outcomes.

tasks.title: Implement local QA engine with grounded RAG responses
tasks.description: Provide Tier 1 and Tier 2 answering via Ollama with strict context-grounding behavior.
tasks.details: Implement local_llm flow with retrieval-aware prompts, evidence-first answer policy, and explicit insufficient-evidence fallback. Capture trace fields for prompt version, retrieved chunk IDs, and latency metrics.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit-test prompt assembly and fallback behavior; integration-test response schema and grounding fields with mocked Ollama when needed.

tasks.title: Implement markdown filesystem tools for agent reasoning
tasks.description: Expose list_sections, read_section, and keyword_grep tools over parsed markdown sources.
tasks.details: Implement deterministic tool contracts with normalized section keys, bounded outputs, and source offsets/line spans. Return structured tool errors for missing sections and no-match grep cases.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit-test each tool on representative markdown fixtures, including negative-path error scenarios.

tasks.title: Implement cloud agent orchestration with 5-loop guard
tasks.description: Run Tier 3 Gemini agent with strict tool allowlist and hard loop termination.
tasks.details: Implement cloud_agent loop state machine that permits only approved tools and stops at 5 iterations with clear termination reasons. Store tool calls and loop counters in trace logs.
tasks.testStrategy: Mock Gemini for loop-limit tests, allowlist enforcement tests, and deterministic termination behavior checks.

subtasks.title: Define agent loop state machine and termination semantics
subtasks.description: Specify turn lifecycle, allowed transitions, and explicit termination reasons including max-loop stop at 5 iterations.

subtasks.title: Implement strict tool allowlist and invocation validator
subtasks.description: Permit only list_sections/read_section/keyword_grep with input schema checks and safe rejection of unsupported tool calls.

subtasks.title: Build Gemini orchestration loop with hard 5-step guard
subtasks.description: Implement model-tool exchange loop that tracks current iteration and force-stops at loop 5 with deterministic final output.

subtasks.title: Persist agent trace logs for loop and tool activity
subtasks.description: Record loop counters, tool invocations, outcomes, and termination reasons in trace logs for observability.

subtasks.title: Create mocked tests for loop guard and allowlist enforcement
subtasks.description: Use mocked Gemini/tool calls to verify max-loop behavior, unauthorized tool rejection, and deterministic termination paths.

tasks.title: Implement Tier 4 structured extraction with source-grounded JSON
tasks.description: Extract validated schema output with per-field source offsets and audit-friendly traces.
tasks.details: Implement extractor flow using LangExtract with strict schema validation, per-field character-level source offsets, provenance requirements, and rejection of unsupported claims. Add preflight token estimation and budget checks before Tier 4 extraction runs, and return normalized success/error envelopes with validation diagnostics.
tasks.testStrategy: Mock LangExtract responses for valid/invalid payloads, verify per-field character-offset provenance, and include integration checks that extraction accuracy reaches >98% on curated invoice/contract fixtures.

subtasks.title: Define extraction schema contract and provenance requirements
subtasks.description: Document required output fields, per-field source offsets, and validation rules for accepted/rejected records.

subtasks.title: Implement LangExtract adapter and request shaping
subtasks.description: Add extractor integration layer that submits schema-guided prompts and normalizes provider responses.

subtasks.title: Implement validation pipeline for JSON and source offsets
subtasks.description: Validate types, required fields, and provenance; reject unsupported claims lacking offsets/evidence references.

subtasks.title: Add normalized success/error envelopes with diagnostics
subtasks.description: Return consistent API-facing result objects containing accepted records, rejected records, and validation error details.

subtasks.title: Create mocked extractor tests for valid/invalid outputs
subtasks.description: Mock LangExtract responses to verify schema enforcement, provenance checks, and deterministic error reporting.

subtasks.title: Add Tier 4 token-estimation and budget guard checks
subtasks.description: Estimate token volume before LangExtract runs, enforce configurable budget/rate thresholds, and fail fast to controlled partial/error states when limits are exceeded.

tasks.title: Deliver API contracts for /ingest and /ask with validation guardrails
tasks.description: Expose core backend capabilities through stable, testable FastAPI endpoints.
tasks.details: Implement POST /ingest and POST /ask request/response contracts, mode-aware routing, correlation IDs, timeout/error mapping, and retry-safe semantics. Ensure ask responses include grounding/citation-ready fields.
tasks.testStrategy: Integration tests for happy paths, malformed payload handling, idempotent ingest behavior, and mode routing correctness.

subtasks.title: Define /ingest and /ask request/response contracts
subtasks.description: Finalize Pydantic schemas for payloads, response envelopes, grounding fields, and correlation ID propagation.

subtasks.title: Implement POST /ingest endpoint with retry-safe semantics
subtasks.description: Wire endpoint to ingestion orchestration, enforce validation bounds, and return deterministic status/error mapping for retries.

subtasks.title: Implement POST /ask endpoint with mode-aware routing
subtasks.description: Route fast/deep modes to local QA or agent/extraction pipelines and enforce grounding/citation-ready response fields.

subtasks.title: Add API guardrails for timeout, error normalization, and idempotency
subtasks.description: Centralize exception mapping, timeout handling, and idempotency behavior to prevent duplicate side effects and ambiguous failures.

subtasks.title: Create integration tests for contracts and malformed payloads
subtasks.description: Cover happy paths, malformed requests, idempotent ingest retries, and mode routing correctness across /ingest and /ask.

tasks.title: Build Streamlit chat interface with mode toggle and trace viewer
tasks.description: Provide user-facing interaction for ingestion and Q&A with transparent reasoning traces.
tasks.details: Implement frontend/app.py chat flow, mode selector, session state, ingest action wiring, and expandable trace display. Keep UI simple and aligned with PRD scope constraints.
tasks.testStrategy: UI-level tests for mode switching and session state; mocked API integration smoke tests for core flows.

tasks.title: [P0] Integrate real deep-mode provider client and streaming
tasks.description: Replace fallback deep-mode client with a production provider integration.
tasks.details: Implement a real cloud model client with API-key auth, retries/backoff, timeout controls, and tool-call response parsing. Wire it into /ask and /ask/stream so deep mode supports token streaming and deterministic error envelopes.
tasks.testStrategy: Provider-mocked integration tests for success, rate-limit, timeout, malformed tool-call, and streaming finalization paths.

subtasks.title: Define deep provider contract and settings
subtasks.description: Specify provider interface, auth/env configuration, request/response schema, retry policy, timeout defaults, and deterministic error taxonomy for deep mode.

subtasks.title: Implement production cloud provider client
subtasks.description: Build real provider client with API key auth, request signing/headers, timeout handling, retry+backoff for transient errors, and structured parsing of model/tool responses.

subtasks.title: Build deep streaming event normalizer
subtasks.description: Convert provider stream callbacks/chunks into normalized NDJSON events (status/token/final) with consistent ordering and graceful fallback on provider stream failure.

subtasks.title: Wire provider into API deep-mode routes
subtasks.description: Replace fallback cloud model wiring in service bootstrap; route /ask and /ask/stream deep mode through provider client while preserving correlation IDs and deterministic error envelopes.

subtasks.title: Add capability and readiness diagnostics
subtasks.description: Expose provider readiness in health diagnostics and startup logs, including missing credential/dependency states and actionable remediation hints.

subtasks.title: Add provider-mocked integration test suite
subtasks.description: Cover deep mode success, rate limit, timeout, malformed tool-call payloads, and stream finalization guarantees for /ask and /ask/stream.

tasks.title: [P0] Replace hashing embeddings with provider-backed embeddings
tasks.description: Use real embedding models for ingest/query instead of hashing vectors.
tasks.details: Implement embedding providers for tier1/tier4 and a query embedder path with versioned model metadata. Ensure ingest-time and query-time dimensions/models match and add migration-safe config flags for rollout.
tasks.testStrategy: Dimension and parity tests, retrieval relevance regression set, and fallback/error-path tests when provider is unavailable.

subtasks.title: Define embedding provider interfaces and config
subtasks.description: Specify tier1 and tier4 embedding client contracts, env settings, model version fields, and dimension validation rules.

subtasks.title: Implement ingest-time embedding clients
subtasks.description: Build provider-backed embedding generation for child and parent chunks with retry, timeout, and normalized metadata.

subtasks.title: Implement query-time embedder parity checks
subtasks.description: Create query embedding path that enforces model and dimension parity with indexed records and emits deterministic errors on mismatch.

subtasks.title: Wire provider embeddings into ingestion and QA runtime
subtasks.description: Replace hashing embedder in runtime pipeline and local QA query embedder while preserving existing API contracts.

subtasks.title: Add rollout and migration controls
subtasks.description: Add feature flags and index version strategy for safe rollout, reindex migration, and rollback between embedding providers.

subtasks.title: Add embedding relevance and resilience tests
subtasks.description: Add tests for dimension checks, retrieval relevance baseline, provider outage handling, and migration guardrails.

tasks.title: [P0] Persist ingestion, idempotency, and chat session state
tasks.description: Move API process-memory maps to durable storage.
tasks.details: Store ingestion records, idempotency replay keys, and session histories in Redis or Postgres with TTL/versioning as needed. Ensure restart-safe behavior and conflict-safe writes under concurrency.
tasks.testStrategy: Restart integration tests, duplicate-request race tests, and consistency checks across multiple API instances.

subtasks.title: Design durable state schema and retention policy
subtasks.description: Define storage schema, keys, TTL strategy, and consistency model for ingestion records, idempotency keys, and session turns.

subtasks.title: Implement persistence adapters
subtasks.description: Build Redis or Postgres repository layer with typed operations for read, write, update, and compare-and-set semantics.

subtasks.title: Migrate idempotency replay storage
subtasks.description: Replace in-memory idempotency map with durable store and preserve replay semantics for single and batch upload flows.

subtasks.title: Migrate ingestion lifecycle storage
subtasks.description: Persist ingest status transitions and events in durable backend and keep API status endpoint behavior stable.

subtasks.title: Migrate chat session history storage
subtasks.description: Persist per session and document turn history with truncation policy and concurrency-safe append behavior.

subtasks.title: Harden concurrency and multi-instance behavior
subtasks.description: Add atomic update paths and lock strategy to prevent duplicate writes or race conditions across multiple API instances.

subtasks.title: Add restart and race-condition integration tests
subtasks.description: Add tests for restart persistence, duplicate request replay, and concurrent session updates under load.

tasks.title: [P0] Enforce production-safe index backend policy
tasks.description: Disallow silent in-memory index fallback outside development.
tasks.details: Add an explicit env gate for in-memory fallback and fail startup in prod when Redis/RedisVL is unavailable. Expose readiness diagnostics that clearly indicate degraded vs. ready states.
tasks.testStrategy: Startup-mode tests for dev/prod profiles and negative tests for missing RedisVL or Redis connectivity.

subtasks.title: Define environment policy matrix for index backends
subtasks.description: Document allowed backends by environment profile and define explicit degraded and fail-fast startup rules.

subtasks.title: Implement startup guardrail for production mode
subtasks.description: Fail API startup when Redis or RedisVL requirements are missing in production profile.

subtasks.title: Add explicit dev fallback switch
subtasks.description: Gate in-memory index fallback behind an explicit development flag and keep default behavior strict.

subtasks.title: Enhance health and readiness diagnostics
subtasks.description: Expose backend mode, readiness state, and fallback reason fields for operator visibility.

subtasks.title: Update deployment docs and runbooks
subtasks.description: Document environment flags, expected startup outcomes, and troubleshooting steps for backend readiness failures.

subtasks.title: Add startup policy and negative-path tests
subtasks.description: Add tests for dev and prod startup behavior, missing dependencies, and missing Redis connectivity.

tasks.title: [P1] Enable Docling and LangExtract in runtime images
tasks.description: Package and verify optional AI parsing/extraction dependencies in Docker/runtime.
tasks.details: Add dependency groups and container layers for docling/langextract and required system packages. Ensure /healthz and startup logs report capability readiness and actionable failure reasons.
tasks.testStrategy: Container smoke tests asserting dependency detection, plus ingestion/extraction regression tests with capabilities toggled on/off.

subtasks.title: Define dependency groups and runtime capability targets
subtasks.description: Specify package groups and capability expectations for docling and langextract across local and container runtimes.

subtasks.title: Add docling and langextract dependencies
subtasks.description: Update project dependencies and optional extras to install required parser and extraction libraries with pinned ranges.

subtasks.title: Update container images with system requirements
subtasks.description: Install required OS packages and optimize Docker layers so parser and extraction dependencies work in runtime images.

subtasks.title: Add startup capability probes and diagnostics
subtasks.description: Expose clear readiness and failure reasons for docling and langextract in startup logs and health responses.

subtasks.title: Add container capability smoke tests
subtasks.description: Add docker-based tests that verify dependency imports and runtime readiness in API and UI service images.

subtasks.title: Add regression tests with capability toggles
subtasks.description: Add ingestion and extraction tests that run with dependencies enabled and disabled to verify graceful fallback behavior.

tasks.title: [P1] Add pluggable parser chain including Google parser
tasks.description: Support parser routing strategy beyond current best-effort fallback.
tasks.details: Implement parser interface routing with Docling primary, Google parser adapter secondary, and text fallback tertiary. Add config-driven selection and per-document parser attribution in ingestion events.
tasks.testStrategy: Fixture tests per parser, routing selection tests, and fallback ordering verification when upstream parsers fail.

subtasks.title: Define parser plugin contract and routing config
subtasks.description: Specify parser interface, selection config, and normalized parser output contract for downstream chunking.

subtasks.title: Implement Google parser adapter
subtasks.description: Add adapter for Google parser output and normalize headings, tables, and page metadata into ParsedMarkdownDocument blocks.

subtasks.title: Refine Docling parser adapter normalization
subtasks.description: Ensure Docling path conforms to shared parser contract and emits stable metadata across parser choices.

subtasks.title: Implement parser chain fallback orchestrator
subtasks.description: Build routing order with Docling primary, Google secondary, and text fallback tertiary with deterministic failover.

subtasks.title: Record parser attribution in ingestion events
subtasks.description: Persist selected parser and fallback transitions into ingestion metadata for observability and debugging.

subtasks.title: Add parser routing and fallback tests
subtasks.description: Add fixture tests for each parser and failure-order tests that assert deterministic fallback and normalized output.

tasks.title: [P1] Expose Tier4 structured extraction as API workflow
tasks.description: Wire LangExtract-based structured extraction into public API paths.
tasks.details: Add extraction endpoint(s) with schema input validation, grounded provenance output, token budget controls, and persistence of extraction artifacts. Integrate with auth/correlation/error envelopes like existing endpoints.
tasks.testStrategy: API integration tests for valid schema, invalid schema, provider failure, and provenance validation semantics.

subtasks.title: Define Tier4 extraction API contract
subtasks.description: Specify endpoint shape, schema input limits, request validation rules, and normalized response envelope for extraction results.

subtasks.title: Implement extraction endpoint handler and validation
subtasks.description: Add API route that validates schemas, enforces limits, and maps extraction requests to the structured extractor.

subtasks.title: Integrate provider and budget controls
subtasks.description: Wire LangExtract provider settings, token budget checks, and deterministic provider error mapping into endpoint flow.

subtasks.title: Persist extraction artifacts and provenance
subtasks.description: Store extraction outputs, diagnostics, and provenance references for later retrieval and audit.

subtasks.title: Unify auth, correlation, and error envelopes
subtasks.description: Align extraction endpoint middleware behavior with existing API correlation and error envelope conventions.

subtasks.title: Add extraction API integration tests
subtasks.description: Cover valid schema, invalid schema, provider failure, budget overflow, and provenance validation cases.

tasks.title: [P2] Add async ingestion worker queue and progress model
tasks.description: Separate request/response path from heavy ingestion workloads.
tasks.details: Introduce queue-backed ingestion execution with worker process(es), retry policy, dead-letter handling, and real-time status updates. Keep /upload fast and idempotent while preserving deterministic status transitions.
tasks.testStrategy: End-to-end queue tests for normal, retry, and poison-message paths plus status progression assertions.

subtasks.title: Select queue backend and message schema
subtasks.description: Decide queue technology, job payload schema, retry metadata, and dead-letter format for ingestion work items.

subtasks.title: Implement async enqueue path for upload or ingest
subtasks.description: Return accepted response quickly while publishing ingestion jobs with idempotency metadata and trace context.

subtasks.title: Implement worker executor with retry and dead-letter
subtasks.description: Build background worker that processes ingestion jobs, applies retry policy, and moves exhausted jobs to dead-letter storage.

subtasks.title: Implement progress and status transition model
subtasks.description: Update ingestion status through queued, processing, partial, indexed, and failed states with event timestamps.

subtasks.title: Harden idempotency and dedupe across queue consumers
subtasks.description: Ensure duplicate submissions do not create duplicate indexing side effects across retries or parallel workers.

subtasks.title: Add end-to-end queue integration tests
subtasks.description: Cover normal execution, retries, poison jobs, status progression, and restart recovery.

tasks.title: [P2] Build observability and evaluation suite for production readiness
tasks.description: Add SLO-oriented telemetry and quality regression harnesses.
tasks.details: Implement metrics/traces for retrieval latency, generation latency, insufficient-evidence rate, and citation completeness. Add evaluation harness for grounded QA quality and hallucination checks on curated corpora.
tasks.testStrategy: Automated benchmark runs in CI with threshold assertions and dashboards/alerts validation in staging.

subtasks.title: Define SLOs and telemetry taxonomy
subtasks.description: Define target SLOs, metric names, labels, and trace conventions for retrieval, generation, and citation quality.

subtasks.title: Instrument API and ingestion metrics
subtasks.description: Add counters, histograms, and error metrics across upload, ingest, retrieval, and answer generation paths.

subtasks.title: Implement distributed tracing and correlation linkage
subtasks.description: Add trace spans and propagate correlation IDs across API, worker, provider, and datastore boundaries.

subtasks.title: Add citation completeness and grounding metrics
subtasks.description: Measure citation presence, page coverage, offset completeness, and insufficient-evidence rates by mode and document type.

subtasks.title: Build evaluation harness and benchmark corpus
subtasks.description: Create curated datasets and automated scoring for grounded QA quality, hallucination checks, and extraction fidelity.

subtasks.title: Add CI gating and reporting
subtasks.description: Run evaluation and telemetry checks in CI with threshold assertions and publish reports for regression tracking.

tasks.title: Expose extraction and observability workflows in UI
tasks.description: Implement Streamlit UI coverage for structured extraction and runtime observability, plus readiness signaling and quickstart profiles so full features are accessible without raw API calls.

subtasks.title: Add structured extraction UI workflow
subtasks.description: Add schema/prompt form in Streamlit, call POST /extract, and render payload diagnostics/artifact path.

subtasks.title: Add observability dashboard panel
subtasks.description: Show healthz observability snapshot and key /metrics values in the UI.

subtasks.title: Add runtime readiness banner
subtasks.description: Display deep provider and optional capability readiness states in UI before chat interactions.

subtasks.title: Add quickstart runtime profiles
subtasks.description: Document and wire local/cloud full-feature env profiles in compose/docs.

tasks.title: Establish runtime settings and shared data schemas
tasks.description: Create the foundational configuration and Pydantic schema layer used by all modules.
tasks.details: Implement src/config/settings.py for env loading and validation, plus src/models/schemas.py for core request/response, document, and trace-compatible models. Fail fast on invalid env values and centralize constants for paths, model names, and service endpoints.
tasks.testStrategy: Unit-test env parsing/overrides and schema validation/serialization, including invalid payload cases.

tasks.title: Compose local infrastructure with persistence and resource limits
tasks.description: Stand up Redis, Ollama, and API services with restart-safe storage and operational guardrails.
tasks.details: Create docker-compose services, health checks, and mounts for ./data, ./models, and Redis persistence. Add explicit memory constraints and restart policies to mitigate OOM risk while preserving data across restarts.
tasks.testStrategy: Run docker compose smoke tests, restart-cycle persistence checks, and controlled memory stress checks.

tasks.title: Optimize Docker dev builds with dependency-layer caching
tasks.description: Prevent heavy dependency re-downloads on source-only changes in docker dev workflow.
tasks.details: Refactor Docker build flow so third-party dependency installation is cached independently from src/frontend code changes. Move dependency install before app source copy, add BuildKit cache mounts for apt and pip, and support lockfile/constraints-driven installs to keep rebuilds incremental while preserving current runtime behavior (api/ui + ai extras). Update compose/dev docs with a clear when-to-build vs when-to-restart matrix.
tasks.testStrategy: Build twice and assert second build reuses dependency layers when only src/frontend files change; verify api/ui start successfully with dev overlay; run targeted tests for compose/docs expectations and smoke-check health endpoints in containers.

subtasks.title: Audit current Docker layer invalidation points
subtasks.description: Document why source edits invalidate pip install layers and identify cache misses in apt/pip stages.

subtasks.title: Refactor Dockerfile for cache-stable dependency install
subtasks.description: Install third-party dependencies from lock/constraints before copying src/frontend; keep project install fast and source-driven.

subtasks.title: Add BuildKit cache mounts for apt and pip
subtasks.description: Use Dockerfile cache mounts to reuse package indexes and wheels across rebuilds while keeping deterministic installs.

subtasks.title: Update compose and developer docs for rebuild policy
subtasks.description: Clarify when to run --build vs normal up/restart and include expected behavior for env-only vs dependency changes.

subtasks.title: Validate incremental rebuild behavior and runtime smoke checks
subtasks.description: Benchmark second build after source-only changes and verify api/ui health and feature readiness remain intact.

tasks.title: Implement phase validation suite for latency and reliability goals
tasks.description: Verify API behavior, restart persistence, and key safety metrics against PRD targets.
tasks.details: Create tests/test_api.py and tests/data fixtures covering ingest-to-ask workflows, restart persistence checks, loop guard verification, Tier 1 latency instrumentation thresholds (<2s), and Tier 4 extraction quality checks (>98% with character-level grounding). Include CI-friendly reporting for regressions.
tasks.testStrategy: Run unit/integration/E2E smoke tests with explicit pyramid targets (about 60/30/10), plus metric assertions for latency, extraction accuracy, loop cap enforcement, and restart data retention.

subtasks.title: Create phase test matrix and fixture inventory
subtasks.description: Define coverage matrix for ingest-to-ask flows, restart persistence, loop guard, latency checks, and extraction-accuracy grounding checks; map required fixtures under tests/data while targeting a 60/30/10 unit/integration/E2E split.

subtasks.title: Implement API integration tests in tests/test_api.py
subtasks.description: Add end-to-end API flow coverage for ingest and ask across fast/deep modes with deterministic assertions.

subtasks.title: Add restart persistence verification tests
subtasks.description: Simulate service restart cycles and assert previously ingested document data remains queryable with no record loss.

subtasks.title: Add loop-guard and safety regression tests
subtasks.description: Assert Tier 3 orchestration enforces 5-iteration cap and surfaces expected termination diagnostics.

subtasks.title: Instrument latency checks and CI-friendly reporting
subtasks.description: Capture Tier 1 latency metrics with pass/fail thresholds and generate machine-readable test reports for regression tracking.

tasks.title: Wire end-to-end runtime orchestration and assignment endpoint parity
tasks.description: Connect the currently implemented components into one production runtime path so manual testing exercises the real pipelines instead of fallbacks.
tasks.details: Implement API wiring so ingest triggers extraction, parsing, chunking, embedding, and indexing via IngestionOrchestrator. Add POST /upload alias compatible with assignment contract and map to ingest semantics for single and multi-file payloads. Replace fallback deep-mode cloud client with configurable runtime provider wiring and explicit capability flags. Ensure Redis-backed indexing is used in Docker runtime with clear failure behavior when RedisVL dependencies are missing. Persist and expose ingestion state so asks can reference uploaded documents deterministically. Add startup checks and health diagnostics that report readiness of Redis, Ollama, and model dependencies. Update Streamlit UI to support upload alias and show ingestion processing status. Update docs and examples for true end-to-end flow under Docker.
tasks.testStrategy: Add integration tests for ingest to ask end-to-end with persisted Redis backend, upload alias behavior, and deep/fast mode routing under configured providers. Add restart persistence tests verifying uploaded docs remain queryable after API restart. Add negative tests for missing dependencies and fallback disablement. Run docker compose smoke tests and manual curl checklist.

subtasks.title: Wire /ingest to run full orchestration pipeline
subtasks.description: Invoke IngestionOrchestrator from API ingest path so uploads execute extraction, parsing, chunking, embedding, and indexing before completion state is returned.

subtasks.title: Add assignment-compatible POST /upload alias
subtasks.description: Implement /upload endpoint for one and many files, normalize to ingest semantics, and return stable contract payloads for each document.

subtasks.title: Persist ingestion state and expose deterministic lookup
subtasks.description: Store ingestion lifecycle records keyed by document_id and idempotency key; expose status fields so ask and UI can reference processing outcomes.

subtasks.title: Integrate configurable deep-mode provider wiring
subtasks.description: Replace fallback cloud model with runtime-configured provider client and explicit capability flags, with clear errors when provider is unavailable.

subtasks.title: Harden Docker runtime dependency readiness
subtasks.description: Ensure Redis/RedisVL, OCR, and parsing dependencies are available in containers; add startup/readiness diagnostics for required services.

subtasks.title: Update Streamlit UI for upload alias and status
subtasks.description: Use /upload where appropriate, support multi-file upload UX, and display ingestion processing status and errors clearly.

subtasks.title: Add end-to-end integration and restart tests
subtasks.description: Cover upload or ingest to ask flows against persisted index backend, deep and fast routing, restart persistence, and dependency-failure behavior.

subtasks.title: Publish Docker manual verification runbook
subtasks.description: Update README with a copy-paste manual checklist for docker compose startup, health checks, ingest/upload, ask, and persistence verification.
